## Checklist

- [ ] `widgets.json` updated with my entry (or my entry's version bump).
- [ ] `screenshots/<id>/lg.png` present and in date.
- [ ] Tarball URL + sha256 in `release` block verified locally.
- [ ] My widget's `plugin.json` validates against the host plugin
      schema (`schema/plugin.schema.json` in the Tesserae repo).
- [ ] No surprising network egress; the "Networking + settings"
      section above lists everything.
